name: Reiko Mikami
description: Kouichi's aunt from Ritsuko's side  ~!and class 3-3 deputy homeroom teacher. She gives her nephew advice on how to make it through Yomiyama through a series of "rules". One of them is to separate the private life from school life, thus Kouichi addresses her as Reiko at home, and Ms. Mikami at school.!~  ~! She is also revealed to be the extra/dead one. Reiko was murdered about an year and a half before the accidents started to happen.!~
